description_long: This object is a modern windmill featuring a tall, cylindrical tubular tower supporting a three-bladed rotor. The blades are long, slender, and symmetrically spaced around a central hub, designed for efficient wind capture. At the top of the tower, a compact nacelle houses the mechanical and electrical components, seamlessly connecting the blades to the structure. The entire windmill is rendered in a uniform, light gray color, giving it a sleek and industrial appearance. The surface appears smooth and hard, typical of metal constructions used in urban or suburban environments. This windmill is suitable for installation in parks, open urban spaces, or near facilities requiring renewable energy sources.
description: A sleek, modern windmill with a tall tubular tower and three long, evenly spaced blades attached to a central hub. The surface is smooth and light gray, with a compact nacelle at the top.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three blades symmetrically spread from the central hub atop the tall tower.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile of the blades and the cylindrical tower, with the nacelle visible at the top.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the three blades and the full height of the tower.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thinness of the blades and the tubular structure of the tower.
